case_title: JUANA RACQUEL GUILLEN VS. TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES, S.A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GUILLEN, JUANA RACQUEL AS TO DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES, S.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
